message:
fix: LR layout arrow routing and add iteration docs page

Layout fixes:
- Fix LR/RL direction: swap row/col for Graphviz WASM rank constraints
- Fix grid fallback: use col for X-axis in LR mode (was using row)
- Add post-processing to detect and replace looping Graphviz edge routes
  with clean orthogonal paths (right-edge → left-edge for LR)
- Use curved splines instead of ortho for LR direction in Zig WASM
- Fix fallback arrow routing to be direction-aware (LR: right→left edges)
- Increase sequence diagram spacing (MSG_START_Y 160→200, MSG_SPACING 60→80)

Docs:
- Add "Iterating on Diagrams" page (sidecar workflow, fromFile, change
  summaries, stats, validation, Mermaid import)
- Add comparison page (drawmode vs Excalidraw/Mermaid/Draw.io MCP)
- Restore LR direction in CI/CD and data pipeline examples
- Regenerate all example PNGs with fixed layout
